The '''''Thunderer''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] which served under rogue [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]]. She helped destroy the Star Destroyer [[Courageous (Imperial-class)|''Courageous'']]. Her fate following Zaarin's defeat is unknown.

==Behind the scenes==
''[[TIE Fighter Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]'' erroneously called this ship ''Thunder''.
